input-field.name: tokenLifetimeHours
input-field.label: Verification link & code lifetime (hours)
Gueltigkeit des Bestaetigungslinks (Stunden)
input-field.helpText: How long the email verification link and verbal code remain valid before expiring. Default: 24 hours.

input-field.name: restrictToSameSalesChannel
input-field.label: Restrict merging to the same sales channel
Auf gleichen Sales Channel beschraenken
input-field.helpText: If enabled, only guest customers from the same sales channel as the authenticated account will be merged.

input-field.name: sendCompletionEmail
input-field.label: Send confirmation email after merge
Bestaetigungs-E-Mail nach Zusammenfuehrung senden
input-field.helpText: Send the customer a notification once the merge has completed successfully.

input-field.name: allowSelfServiceInitiation
input-field.label: Allow self-service merge initiation
Self-Service-Initiierung erlauben
input-field.helpText: Show a "Merge previous orders" entry in My Account.

input-field.name: showRegistrationHint
input-field.label: Show post-registration hint when guest orders are detected
Hinweis nach Registrierung anzeigen
input-field.helpText: If a newly registered customer email matches existing guest orders, display a flash message pointing to the verified merge flow. No data is changed automatically.

input-field.name: allowDirectMergeForTrustedCsr
input-field.label: Allow direct merge by trusted CSR (no email verification)
Direkte Zusammenfuehrung durch vertrauenswuerdigen CSR erlauben
input-field.helpText: For well-known customers where inbox ownership is already established. Requires the "laenen_guest_merge.trusted" ACL privilege. Off by default.
